sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Origin Agritech Announces Fiscal Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Origin Agritech Ltd. announced its financial results for the fiscal year ended September 30, 2025, reporting a revenue of RMB 91.3 million and a net loss of RMB 53.3 million. Despite the financial decline attributed to equipment upgrades and reduced external seed production services, the company highlighted significant business accomplishments including new partnerships, product launches, expansion of its distribution network, and advancements in R&D infrastructure. CEO Weibin Yan emphasized the company's "recovery" focused on restoring its team, research, and sales network as part of a three-stage strategic plan.

feed.title: Chinese seed maker Origin Agritech posts loss as it upgrades Xinjiang plant
feed.summary: Origin Agritech (NASDAQ: SEED) reported a net loss of RMB 53.3 million (US$7.5M) for fiscal year 2025, compared to a profit in the prior year, with revenue declining to RMB 91.3 million (US$12.8M). The company attributed the poor performance primarily to extensive upgrades and modernization at its Xinjiang factory which disrupted production. Despite the financial setback, Origin Agritech highlighted significant operational progress including new corn varieties, expanded R&D platforms, and a restored Xinjiang processing line, positioning for future growth under a multi-year strategic plan.

feed.title: Peoples Financial Services president to retire in April
feed.summary: Peoples Financial Services Corp. announced that Thomas P. Tulaney will retire as President of the company and Peoples Security Bank and Trust Company on April 3, 2026. Tulaney, with over 40 years of banking experience, will continue as a Senior Advisor. Gerard A. Champi, the current CEO, is expected to assume the additional role of President.

feed.title: Meritage holds its line as new-home demand turns inelastic
feed.summary: Meritage Homes' Q4 2025 performance demonstrates a strategic focus on protecting margins and controlling inventory rather than aggressively pursuing sales in a soft market. The company prioritized operational discipline, maintaining faster cycle times and a strong balance sheet, while making deliberate choices to "hold the line" on incentives. This approach emphasizes operational excellence as a core strategy when buyer confidence is low, leading to a pragmatic pivot despite lower reported financials.

feed.title: OmniAb Updates Bylaws to Align with SEC Proxy Rules
feed.summary: OmniAb (OABI) has updated its bylaws to align with SEC universal proxy rules, effective January 30, 2026. These revisions tighten disclosure and procedural requirements for shareholder nominations and business proposals, aiming to enhance transparency and reinforce the company's control over the nomination process. Despite significant financial challenges, OmniAb shows some optimism through positive technical indicators and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Coca Cola Femsa (NYSE:KOF) Rating Lowered to Hold at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has downgraded Coca Cola Femsa (NYSE:KOF) from a "Buy" to a "Hold" rating. This decision stands amidst mixed analyst opinions, as UBS raised its price target to $111 with a "Buy" rating, while JPMorgan lowered its rating to "Neutral." Currently, KOF holds an average rating of "Moderate Buy" from analysts, with an average price target of $103.00, and is trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Raised to "Strong-Buy" at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen upgraded Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) to a "Strong-Buy" rating, with several other analysts raising their price targets, indicating a generally positive outlook despite a consensus "Hold" rating. This upgrade follows a mixed Q4 earnings report, where revenue exceeded estimates but EPS fell short, though management provided optimistic FY2026 guidance and highlighted a record backlog and expansion of THAAD interceptor production. The company's recent performance also shows increased institutional investor activity and favorable news regarding defense spending and production ramp-ups.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) Upgraded at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) was upgraded from a "sell" to a "hold" rating by Wall Street Zen analysts. The stock maintains a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $28.50. Despite beating EPS estimates, the company missed revenue expectations for Q4 2025, primarily due to weak wood-product pricing and softness in timberlands and wood products segments.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Cut to "Hold" at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has downgraded Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) to a "hold" rating from a "buy," though the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an $87.05 price target. The company recently exceeded Q4 EPS expectations and announced a $1.0 billion share buyback program. Despite insider sales, institutional ownership remains high at 96.5%, and Synchrony Financial has provided strong FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Wall Street Zen Downgrades Stryker (NYSE:SYK) to Hold
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has downgraded Stryker (NYSE:SYK) from "buy" to "hold," despite the consensus remaining a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $426.95. The downgrade follows Stryker beating Q4 estimates and raising its full-year profit forecast, though notable insider selling occurred last quarter.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Unveils New Tools As Valuation And Growth Draw Focus
feed.summary: Booking Holdings is launching new travel management tools and expanding sustainability partnerships, including KAYAK for Business "Events" and Agoda's sustainability initiatives. These developments are highlighted as the company's stock trades around $5,001.84, with a significant increase over the past three and five years, prompting investors to consider how these moves will affect future performance. Despite the positive news, key considerations include the company's P/E ratio, which is higher than the industry average, and its substantial debt.

feed.title: Abbott Resets Nutrition While Expanding Diagnostics And Device Growth Drivers
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories is rebalancing its business by addressing challenges in its Nutrition segment through pricing, promotional, and cost structure adjustments. Simultaneously, the company is expanding its diagnostics and device capabilities with the pending acquisition of Exact Sciences for cancer diagnostics and new product rollouts in diabetes care and cardiovascular devices. These strategic moves aim to reshape Abbott's portfolio and focus on higher-technology healthcare categories.

feed.title: The Truth About PROS Holdings Inc: Is This Quiet AI Stock About To Explode?
feed.summary: PROS Holdings Inc (PRO) is an under-the-radar AI stock specializing in pricing and revenue optimization software for large enterprises like airlines and hotels. While not a mainstream viral sensation, it's gaining traction in B2B AI circles as a "selective risk" play for investors interested in high-growth, niche SaaS companies. The article suggests that PROS offers a potentially high-upside opportunity for those willing to research and endure volatility, contrasting it with larger competitors like Salesforce.

feed.title: A Look At PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) has shown recent strong share price momentum but is currently valued as 1% overvalued by Simply Wall St's narrative model. Despite this, the company is well-positioned for future growth due to demand for residential mortgages and its integrated platform, though its fair value calculation incorporates falling revenue expectations and a lower future P/E. Investors should consider key risks like interest rate swings and potential dividend cuts.

feed.title: Wall Street Bullish on Progress Software Corporation (PRGS), Here's Why
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts are bullish on Progress Software Corporation (PRGS) following its strong fiscal Q4 2025 earnings report. The company reported significant revenue growth and an EPS beat, with analysts raising price targets and reiterating "Buy" ratings. Progress Software's strategic execution, healthy annual recurring revenue, and potential to benefit from AI adoption are cited as key factors for this positive outlook.

feed.title: INVO Fertility Signs Multiple Material Agreements
feed.summary: INVO Fertility (IVF) has signed two financial agreements to enhance its liquidity. An institutional investor will exercise existing warrants for approximately $7.5 million, receiving new unregistered warrants. Additionally, the company has engaged Maxim Group as its exclusive lead warrant solicitation agent.

feed.title: Ballard, Northrim Bancorp CFO, buys shares worth $29979
feed.summary: Jed W. Ballard, EVP and CFO of Northrim Bancorp INC, purchased shares totaling $29,979 in two separate transactions on January 30, 2026. These purchases increased his direct and indirect holdings in the company. Northrim BanCorp also recently announced a $60 million subordinated notes offering and declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per share.

feed.title: IO Biotech (IOBT) launches restructuring, CMO exit and up to $2.6M charges
feed.summary: IO Biotech Inc. is implementing a restructuring and workforce reduction plan to significantly cut operating expenses, expecting to incur $2.4 million to $2.6 million in charges during Q1 2026 for severance and termination costs. The company also announced the departure of its Chief Medical Officer, Qasim Ahmad, M.D., effective February 15, 2026, and has retained Raymond James & Associates, Inc. as its exclusive financial advisor to explore strategic alternatives. These actions are part of a broader effort to reduce costs while seeking potential transactions or other strategic options for the company.

feed.title: MITSUI SUMITOMO INSURANCE CO LTD Increases Stake in WR Berkley C
feed.summary: MITSUI SUMITOMO INSURANCE CO LTD, a 10% owner of WR Berkley Corp (WRB), significantly increased its stake by purchasing 485,000 shares, bringing its total holdings to 56,103,435 shares. This transaction is part of a positive trend of insider buying at WR Berkley Corp, with 11 insider buys and no sells over the past year. Despite the company's stock being deemed fairly valued by GuruFocus's GF Value, the insider activity indicates confidence in future prospects for the commercial lines property and casualty insurer.

feed.title: Investors Purchase Large Volume of Call Options on Direxion Daily Junior Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares (NYSEARCA:JDST)
feed.summary: Investors purchased a significantly higher volume of call options for Direxion Daily Junior Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares (NYSEARCA:JDST) on Friday, with trading up 107% compared to typical volume. Several institutional investors have also recently adjusted their holdings in JDST. The stock opened at $2.02 and tracks a 2x inverse exposure to an index of junior gold and silver mining companies.

feed.title: The Truth About Cisco Systems Inc: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Paying Attention to CSCO
feed.summary: Cisco Systems Inc (CSCO) is attracting new attention due to its role in AI infrastructure, moving beyond its "dad stock" image. While not a flashy, high-growth stock like some competitors, Cisco offers stability, consistent dividends, and is strategically shifting towards software, subscriptions, and security to capitalize on the AI boom. Investors are urged to see it as a "blue-chip AI infrastructure" play for long-term growth and income rather than a speculative short-term gain.

feed.title: Welltower Set to Report Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Welltower Inc., a REIT specializing in senior housing, is scheduled to report its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 10, 2026, after U.S. markets close. Investors are keenly awaiting these results to assess the company's performance, particularly focusing on occupancy rates and rental income growth, given the favorable demographic trends supporting demand for senior living accommodations. A conference call will follow on February 11, 2026, during which management's outlook for the 2026 fiscal year will be a key point of interest for market participants.

feed.title: The Truth About Tyler Technologies: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Paying Attention
feed.summary: This article examines Tyler Technologies (TYL), a company specializing in software for local governments, courts, and public safety. It highlights the company's "boring but rich" potential due to sticky government contracts and its role in the public sector's cloud migration. While not a viral stock, it's presented as a stable, long-term investment for those prioritizing predictable cash flows and compounding growth over rapid returns and social media hype.

feed.title: Assessing Super Group (SGHC) Valuation After Guidance Update And Special Dividend Announcement
feed.summary: Super Group (SGHC) has updated its full-year 2025 revenue guidance to US$2.17b - US$2.27b and declared a special dividend of US$0.25 per share. Despite a recent 14.95% share price decline over the past month, the company is still considered 42.9% undervalued with a fair value of US$17.63, driven by anticipated higher EBITDA margins and improved free cash flow from technology investments. Investors are encouraged to assess the narrative and risks, or build their own investment models.

feed.title: N able AI Push Links Cyber Resilience Platform To Undervalued Shares
feed.summary: N-able (NYSE:NABL) introduced AI-driven upgrades to its cyber resilience platform, enhancing endpoint management, security operations, and data protection for managed service providers catering to small- and mid-sized businesses. This move positions N-able at the intersection of cybersecurity and managed IT services, with the company's shares currently trading significantly below analyst targets and estimated fair value. While the AI integration is central to their cyber resilience strategy, investors should monitor partner adoption, pricing, and the impact on overall profitability, especially given recent share price weakness and net losses.

feed.title: LivaNova (LIVN) Upgraded to Overweight by KeyBanc
feed.summary: KeyBanc Capital Markets analyst Brett Fishbin upgraded LivaNova (LIVN) to Overweight from Sector Weight, setting an $81 price target and implying a 27% upside. This upgrade is based on KeyBanc's positive 2026 outlook for the Medical Technology segment, noting sustainable trends and disappearing valuation premiums. Goldman Sachs also recently reaffirmed a Neutral rating for LIVN, increasing its price target to $66.

feed.title: Lumentum Holdings stock hits all-time high at 406.25 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. stock recently reached an all-time high of $406.25, closing at $407.75, which is 0.95% above its 52-week high. The company has seen a 354.2% increase in stock value over the past year and a 12.46% gain in the last week, driven by strong performance and investor confidence, particularly in the optical and photonic products industry with 33.62% revenue growth. Analyst price targets have been raised, and Lumentum has expanded its board, reflecting increased focus on AI and strategic expansion.

feed.title: Kirby (NYSE:KEX) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Citigroup Analyst Says
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Kirby (NYSE:KEX) to $147 with a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 23.9% upside. This follows Kirby's Q4 earnings beat with $1.68 EPS, despite a slight revenue miss, and positive company actions like share repurchases and debt reduction. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, suggesting generally positive sentiment.

feed.title: Here’s What Trump’s VP Pick J.D. Vance Owns in His Stock Portfolio
feed.summary: J.D. Vance, recently announced as Donald Trump's Vice Presidential pick, is an active investor with an estimated net worth of $8.69 million. His public equity portfolio includes investments in benchmark indices (SPY, QQQ, DIA), a crude oil ETF (OILK) reflecting his anti-ESG stance, and Bitcoin. Vance also previously sold a portion of his Walmart stock and has proposed tax credits for gas cars.

feed.title: Markel Group to review 2025 results in Feb. 5 conference call
feed.summary: Markel Group (NYSE: MKL) announced it will host a conference call on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 9:30 AM ET to discuss its quarterly and year-end 2025 financial results and business developments. Investors can join the call via live webcast at ir.mklgroup.com or by phone. A replay of the call will be available on the company's website approximately one hour after the event concludes.

feed.title: Liberty Broadband Stock Rises After Key Financial Insights
feed.summary: Liberty Broadband Corporation (LBRDK) saw its stock price rise by 7.37% due to a new strategic partnership, improved gross margins, and stable debt management. Analysts are optimistic about the company's future growth, highlighting its potential to capture a larger market share. Despite some operational losses, strategic financial maneuvers and robust market presence contribute to a promising outlook for investors.

feed.title: Public Storage (PSA) Valuation Check After Raised Guidance And US$1.3b Growth Plan
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) has revised its 2025 guidance upwards and announced plans for approximately US$1.3 billion in acquisitions and developments for the year. Despite mixed short-term stock performance, the REIT is considered to be modestly undervalued with a fair value estimate of around $309 per share compared to its current trading price of $276, suggesting potential for long-term value creation. The valuation relies on assumptions of strong financial flexibility and continued reinvestment, though potential risks like oversupply and tighter rent regulations could impact future performance.

feed.title: Is Equity Residential (EQR) Offering Value After A 8% One Year Share Price Decline
feed.summary: Equity Residential (EQR) has experienced an 8% share price decline over the past year, prompting an evaluation of its current value. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 32.5%, with an intrinsic value of $92.34 compared to its current price of $62.32. Additionally, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 20.52x is in line with the Residential REITs industry average and below Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 24.97x, also indicating undervaluation based on earnings.

feed.title: Key facts: GSI Technology reports Q3 losses; achieves Gemini-II milestones
feed.summary: GSI Technology reported Q3 net income of -3.02 million and an operating income of -6.906 million. Despite the losses, the company achieved key commercialization and validation milestones for its Gemini-II product. This product is aimed at securing design wins in both defense and commercial edge deployments.

feed.title: NovaBay Pharma Schedules Special Shareholder Meeting on Warrants
feed.summary: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals has scheduled a special shareholder meeting for March 12, 2026, to vote on proposals to issue common stock, which will result from the exercise of pre-funded warrants issued in private placements in October 2025 and January 2026. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates NBY as Neutral due to weak financial performance and dilution risks despite improving capital access. The stock currently has a Sell rating from analysts with a $3.00 price target.

feed.title: Oxford Lane Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:OXLC) to Issue Monthly Dividend of $0.20
feed.summary: Oxford Lane Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:OXLC) has announced a monthly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on June 30th to shareholders of record on June 16th, which implies an annualized yield of about 19.8%. The company's high payout ratio of 509.1% suggests the dividend is not fully covered by earnings, with the company relying on its balance sheet. This announcement follows a significant miss in quarterly earnings, with EPS of $1.24 against an estimated $2.25 and revenue of $128.3 million versus an estimated $247.9 million, leading to a 15% drop in stock price.

feed.title: IF Bancorp (NASDAQ:IROQ) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results
feed.summary: IF Bancorp (NASDAQ:IROQ) recently announced its quarterly earnings, reporting $0.41 EPS. The company's stock traded down slightly at $27.12, with a market capitalization of $90.85 million. Institutional ownership stands at approximately 44.11%, and analysts currently maintain a consensus "Hold" rating for the stock.

feed.title: JFU - 9F Inc ADR Stock Price and Quote
feed.summary: This article provides detailed real-time stock information for 9F Inc. ADR (JFU), including its last close price, percentage change, market capitalization, key financial ratios, performance metrics, and recent news announcements. It also highlights numerous class action lawsuit updates against the company from various law firms, particularly in March 2021.

feed.title: 3 charged after stealing more than $18,000 from Ulta Beauty stores, records show
feed.summary: Three individuals, Yilianne Casero, Yoandys Diaz, and Sariel Maqueira, have been charged with stealing over $18,000 worth of merchandise from Ulta Beauty stores and Sephora in East Tennessee. They were apprehended during a traffic stop where authorities discovered the stolen goods in their car, leading to charges including theft and violation of the Organized Retail Crime Prevention Act. Casero also had outstanding warrants.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) Margin Slippage Tests Bullish Earnings Growth Narrative
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) reported Q3 FY 2025 revenue of US$3.8 billion and EPS of US$14.09, but its trailing net profit margin slipped to 32.1% from 33.6% a year ago. This margin erosion and a 7.4% annual earnings decline over the past five years are challenging the bullish growth narrative, despite external forecasts for 10.3% annual earnings growth and the stock trading below industry P/E multiples. The company's profitability remains high in absolute terms, but the direction of earnings is a point of concern for investors.

feed.title: Knife River Corp: Calm Surface, Quiet Accumulation – What KNF’s Trading Tape Really Signals
feed.summary: Knife River Corp's stock has entered a period of low-volume consolidation, with modest pullbacks recently, though long-term holders still retain significant gains since its spin-off. Wall Street holds a cautious-to-optimistic view, with catalysts focused on infrastructure spending and margin execution, suggesting that future performance will depend on the company's ability to convert its operations into consistent free cash flow. The article notes that the stock is in a "news-light" environment, causing market attention to shift from dramatic announcements to underlying cyclical trends, with analysts looking for proof of sustained profitability.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor (DECK) Climbs 19% on Upbeat Outlook, Earnings
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (DECK) saw its stock climb 19.50% after reporting strong third-quarter earnings and an optimistic outlook for fiscal year 2026. The company reported a 5.3% jump in net income and a 7% increase in net sales, driven by robust demand for its UGG and HOKA brands. Deckers anticipates net sales between $5.4 billion to $5.425 billion for the full fiscal year, with gross margins around 57% and diluted EPS between $6.80 to $6.85.

feed.title: DTE upgrades, tree trimming expanded in township
feed.summary: DTE Energy is expanding its upgrade and tree trimming efforts in Groveland Township, with investments expected to reach about $16 million. These improvements, which include installing smart devices and rebuilding infrastructure, aim to enhance electricity reliability and reduce outages for over 8,000 customers. Township supervisor Kevin Scramlin anticipates better days ahead for the community due to DTE's ongoing work.

feed.title: Kingstone Companies Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend to Shareholders
feed.summary: Kingstone Companies (KINS) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share, payable on February 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 11, 2026. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rated KINS as "Outperform" due to its strong financial performance, attractive valuation, effective management, and positive earnings call. The company specializes in property and casualty insurance, primarily offering homeowners coverage in the Northeast.

feed.title: Angel Oak financial strategies income term trust: Fierman buys FINS By Investing.com
feed.summary: Michael Fierman, Investment Adviser Principal at Angel Oak Financial Strategies Income Term Trust (NYSE:FINS), has reported several share purchases totaling $214,087, suggesting confidence in the trust's outlook, especially as it trades near its 52-week high. These transactions occurred in November and December of 2025, bringing Fierman's direct ownership to 125,420 shares. The trust offers a substantial dividend yield of 10.49% and has low price volatility, while it has also recently postponed its annual shareholder meeting to allow time after recent corporate actions.

feed.title: Angel Oak Financial Strategies Income Trust principal buys $118k
feed.summary: Sreeniwas Prabhu, a Principal at Angel Oak Capital Advisors, purchased 9,203 shares of Angel Oak Financial Strategies Income Term Trust (NYSE:FINS) for $118,534 on November 20, 2025. This transaction increases Prabhu's direct holdings to 175,180 shares. The company, which has a market capitalization of $439.43 million and a P/E ratio of 8.34, also announced a delay in its annual shareholder meeting following recent corporate actions.

feed.title: OSI Systems (OSIS) Earnings Growth Outpaces Modest Revenue Lift Challenging Cautious Narratives
feed.summary: OSI Systems (OSIS) recently released its Q2 2026 results, showing a 13.9% earnings growth despite a more modest 5.6% revenue increase. This indicates improved efficiency and profitability, with the net margin rising to 8.5%. However, concerns persist regarding the company's debt coverage by operating cash flow and its share price trading above its discounted cash flow fair value.

feed.title: Why the AI capex cycle is built to persist
feed.summary: The article argues that the AI capital expenditure (capex) cycle is likely to persist for the next two to three years, driven by competitive necessity rather than a traditional boom/bust dynamic. It highlights that hyperscalers face a "Nash equilibrium" where aggressive investment is rational, supply constraints keep prices robust, and scaling laws continue to justify spending. The authors emphasize that while monetization may lag initial investment, the long-term opportunity and strategic importance will sustain the cycle, making execution and efficiency critical for investor success.

feed.title: Nationwide Amazon Fresh WARN Act Investigation
feed.summary: Strauss Borrelli PLLC is investigating Amazon.com, Inc. dba Amazon Fresh for potential violations of the WARN Act due to recent mass layoffs across multiple states, including California, Maryland, and Pennsylvania. The law firm believes affected employees may be entitled to 60 days of severance pay and benefits because Amazon allegedly failed to provide the required 60 days' notice before closing Amazon Fresh and Go locations nationwide, impacting potentially over 5,000 employees. The WARN Act requires employers with 100 or more employees to give a 60-day notice for significant layoffs or plant closings, allowing workers time to prepare for job loss.

feed.title: Enphase Energy to lay off ~160 employees as part of broader restructuring
feed.summary: Enphase Energy plans to lay off approximately 160 employees, accounting for 10% of its global workforce, as part of a restructuring plan announced by CEO Badri Kothandaraman. The layoffs are expected to incur a restructuring charge between $8 million and $10 million, primarily in the first quarter of fiscal year 2024. Despite the workforce reduction, Kothandaraman expressed confidence in the company's long-term prospects, citing the Inflation Reduction Act as a tailwind that will support growth in 2025.
